edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:08d42cd1887f
edges.original_sentence: In 1887, under the direction of William Brown, it was planted with 14 species of coniferous and deciduous trees, of which 10 are still present.

source_spans.text: In 1887, under the direction of William Brown, it was planted with 14 species of coniferous and deciduous trees, of which 10 are still present.

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:08d42cd1887f
edges.original_sentence: In the 107 years since planting, the site has acquired some structural characteristics similar to the surrounding native deciduous forest... Canopy cover has increased from 85% to over 95(Yo since 1930

source_spans.text: In the 107 years since planting, the site has acquired some structural characteristics similar to the surrounding native deciduous forest... Canopy cover has increased from 85% to over 95(Yo since 1930

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:f0e0ced8bd34
edges.original_sentence: In the upland portions of the site where Pinus nigra, A. platanoides, and Larix decidua occur, the substrate is covered with needle litter, and herbaceous or woody understory vegetation is extremely sparse.

source_spans.text: In the upland portions of the site where Pinus nigra, A. platanoides, and Larix decidua occur, the substrate is covered with needle litter, and herbaceous or woody understory vegetation is extremely sparse.

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:5da2da24d64a
edges.original_sentence: Seed-eating rodents and birds are common in the stand, and seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa in Brown's Woods.

source_spans.text: Seed-eating rodents and birds are common in the stand, and seed predation may therefore be responsible for the regeneration failure of many of the woody taxa in Brown's Woods.

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:6e06667b3f46
edges.original_sentence: All regeneration was restricted to areas of the woods where conifers were absent and where deciduous litter was abundant... Six species of native herbaceous perennials... have invaded the understory near the center of the site

source_spans.text: All regeneration was restricted to areas of the woods where conifers were absent and where deciduous litter was abundant... Six species of native herbaceous perennials... have invaded the understory near the center of the site

source_document.title: Brown's Woods: An Early Gravel Pit Forest Restoration Project, Ontario, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:42444d01c428
edges.original_sentence: Following Brown's departure, the College of Agriculture made the important management decision not to intervene in the future development of the forest; this decision has added to its present scientific value.

source_spans.text: Following Brown's departure, the College of Agriculture made the important management decision not to intervene in the future development of the forest; this decision has added to its present scientific value.
